title: Hire a temporary foreign worker - Canada.ca
content:
## Hire a temporary foreign worker
Attract and hire global talent with or without an LMIA (labour market impact assessment).
Starting March 13, 2026, your worker may be eligible for a labour market impact assessment (LMIA) exemption.
Find out more about this exemption .
- Sign in to the Employer Portal (LMIA-exempt)
- Sign in to LMIA Online
The hiring program you use depends on whether you need LMIA.

### Check if you need an LMIA

### Post a job on Job Bank

Program streams, employer responsibilities for Temporary Foreign Worker Program

## Special instructions to hire certain workers

### Top talent: Faster processing
Hire through Global Skills Strategy

### International students
Hire students and recent graduates

### Skilled youth aged 18 to 35
Hire through International Experience Canada (IEC)

### French-speaking workers outside Quebec
Hire through Francophone Mobility
Hire an overnight camp counsellor
Hire crew members of a maritime vessel
Hire a home care worker
